intro: Skool Map Scraper is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for education. Do I need a paid Apify plan to use this actor? This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: map your members geographically to plan regional events or meetups
export full member profiles with social links, bios, and engagement levels
build geo-targeted audience segments from member coordinates

faq.q: How do I run Skool Map Scraper?
faq.a: Open Skool Map Scraper on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
Skool Map Scraper runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.

faq.q: What data can Skool Map Scraper extract?
faq.a: - User ID, username, first name, last name, full name - Profile URL (https://www.skool.com/@username)
